ai.placeholder: Ask a question, press Enter to send...
ai.welcome:
👋 I'm your AI database assistant

You can ask me:
• "Show top 10 products by sales last month"
• "Optimize this query for performance"
• "Design a schema for an order management system"
• "Generate 100 test records for users table"

about.title: About OpenNavicat
about.description:
CLI-First, AI-Native Open Source Database Management Tool
Built with Python & PySide6
